articles.title: iOS 27 adds an all-new app to your iPhone’s Home Screen
articles.summary: Apple announced iOS 27 at WWDC this week, coming with a ton of new Siri and Apple Intelligence features. One of the biggest changes here is the addition of an all-new Siri app. This marks the first time that Siri has been pre-installed as a standalone app for iPhone users …
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 在你的 iPhone 主屏幕上添加全新應用
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在本週的 WWDC 發佈了 iOS 27，帶來大量新的 Siri 和 Apple Intelligence 功能。最大的改變之一是新增獨立的 Siri 應用，這是 Siri 首次以預裝獨立應用的形式出現在 iPhone 上。

articles.title: AirPods Pro 3 are getting even better with iOS 27, order them today at their lowest price ever
articles.summary: While we are still slightly under a couple weeks out from Amazon’s massive summer sale event , the best Prime Day deal of the year might already be live right now – Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 have now dropped to the best price ever at $179 shipped. Plus, Apple just announced a bunch of new iOS 27 features for AirPods coming this year … so there’s no better time to jump in.
articles.title_zh: AirPods Pro 3 通過 iOS 27 變得更好，現在以史上最低價購買
articles.summary_zh: Apple 的 AirPods Pro 3 現已降至有史以來最低價格 $179，同時 Apple 剛剛為 iOS 27 宣佈了多項新功能。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘oh my hours’ counts the hours you’ve wasted, not your screen time
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Many people want to spend less time on their iPhones, whether that be for productivity, socializing more, or something else. Screen time tools prove useful here, providing users with an idea of how much time they’re spending on their iPhones. For many people, though, they end up being too lenient to be effective. With ‘ oh my hours ’ – the app flips the script, and instead makes you aware of how many hours you’ve wasted in an undesired app, rather than simply telling you you’ve hit your screen time limit.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'oh my hours' 計算你浪費的時間，而不是屏幕時間
articles.summary_zh: 這是 9to5Mac 的每週系列，展示獨立應用世界中的最新應用。許多人希望在 iPhone 上花費更少的時間，無論是為了提高生產力還是更多地社交。

articles.title: Hands-on: Belkin’s new 25W MagSafe battery packs 10,000mAh for your iPhone
articles.summary: Belkin has a beefy new 25W MagSafe battery on the market – packing a whopping 10,000mAh of capacity. It has two killer new features: a kickstand, and a second MagSafe ring. Initially unveiled back at CES 2026, it’s now available for purchase.
articles.title_zh: 動手測試：Belkin 新款 25W MagSafe 電池擁有 10,000mAh 容量，適配你的 iPhone
articles.summary_zh: Belkin 推出了新款 25W MagSafe 電池，容量高達 10,000mAh，具有支架和第二個 MagSafe 環等創新功能。該產品已於 CES 2026 首次亮相，現已開放購買。

articles.title: HeyPolo is a smarter Find My app for family, friends, and co-workers
articles.summary: There are a number of ways to share your location with family and friends, from Apple’s built-in Find My app to location pins in messaging apps like WhatsApp. HeyPolo aims to deliver smarter features, including even greater privacy controls than available in the Find My app. The app was developed by the team behind leading VPN provider Surfshark, with seven key features on offer.
articles.title_zh: HeyPolo 是一款針對家人、朋友和同事的更智能的 Find My 應用
articles.summary_zh: HeyPolo 提供比 Apple 內置 Find My 應用更智能的位置共享功能，包括更強大的隱私控制。

articles.title: What new Google Messages features are rolling out [June 2026]
articles.summary: Like other Google apps, Messages for Android A/B tests many features. It can take the RCS/SMS client a rather long time to actually launch new functionality in stable. From various reports, Google announcements , and devices we’ve checked, this is the current state of Messages.
articles.title_zh: Google Messages 推出哪些新功能 [2026 年 6 月]
articles.summary_zh: Google Messages 針對 Android 進行了多項功能測試，本文介紹了當前 RCS/SMS 客戶端的最新功能狀態。

articles.title: Upgrade your summer soccer watch party with these top tech gadgets
articles.summary: It’s officially watch party season, especially with a certain special soccer event happening right about now. To celebrate the occasion, we’ve partnered with brands producing some cutting-edge tech to show you the ultimate soccer watch party setup. Keep your watch party pool clean with the WYBOT S3
articles.title_zh: 用這些頂級科技小工具升級你的夏季足球觀賽派對
articles.summary_zh: 隨著足球賽事的進行，我們與科技品牌合作推薦了終極足球觀賽派對設置的必備科技產品。

articles.title: Weekly poll: what do you think about iOS 27?
articles.summary: It was a busy week over at Cupertino, California – the annual WWDC introduced the latest versions of Apple’s key operating systems. Let’s focus in on iOS – what did you think about its new features and improvements? If you need a refresher or you missed the announcement altogether, here’s what’s new in iOS 27. The headlining feature this week – not just for iOS but the whole WWDC – is the new Siri AI. This and the next generation of Apple Intelligence. iOS 27 But there were other changes too, like Apple trying to polish the maligned Liquid Glass design language. Also, iPhones...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：你如何看待 iOS 27？
articles.summary_zh: 本週 Cupertino 的年度 WWDC 大會推出了 Apple 最新的作業系統版本。讓我們關注 iOS 的新功能和改進。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Motorola Razr Fold is pricey, but may have a future despite its flaws
articles.summary: Like with other book-style foldables, Motorola Razr Fold’s biggest flaw is its price – indeed, in last week’s poll, the biggest group of voters was the one that gave the price tag a thumbs down. To put it in concrete terms, the Fold has an MSRP of EUR 2,000 / GBP 1,800 / INR 150,000 / USD 1,900 / CAD 2,700. That’s not the only problem, but the high cost of the device amplifies its other issues. For one, Motorola promises 7 years of OS updates and security patches. That’s on par with what other manufacturers promise and better than most other Motorolas. However, Moto just doesn’t have the...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：Motorola Razr Fold 價格昂貴，但儘管有缺陷仍可能有前景
articles.summary_zh: 與其他書式摺疊手機一樣，Motorola Razr Fold 的最大缺陷是價格，MSRP 為 $1,900 美元。

articles.title: Deals: Galaxy S26+ gets a deeper discount on its 512GB model, Galaxy S26 Ultra also on sale
articles.summary: This week saw the annual WWDC from Apple. The week before, it was Google I/O – both are software-focused events, so there wasn’t any new hardware. So, we turn to older models instead. The Samsung Galaxy S26+ is not going to win any popularity contests, but it’s a solid middle-of-the-road smartphone that offers a good balance of features, support and price. Right now, the 512GB model is down to $900 – that’s the same price as the 256GB version, but note that only the Black units have such a deep cut. The Cobalt Violet is the second best at $1,020, which is a rather large gap. If you don’t...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Galaxy S26+ 512GB 型號獲得更深折扣，Galaxy S26 Ultra 也在促銷中
articles.summary_zh: 本週舉行了 Apple 的年度 WWDC，前一週是 Google I/O，兩者都是軟件為主的活動。Samsung Galaxy S26+ 是一款不錯的中端智能手機選擇。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 series gets a feature that many other Android phones had for years
articles.summary: Samsung's Galaxy-branded smartphones and tablets have been lacking a feature that many other Android devices, especially from Chinese brands, had for years. We are talking about the real-time network speed indicator displayed in the status bar, now available for Galaxy users via the QuickStar module in Samsung's Good Lock customization app. Samsung users could get a real-time network speed indicator on their Galaxy phone, but it required a third-party app or enabling a firmware flag if the device was rooted. But that's not needed now if your device is running the Android 17-based One UI 9,...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy S26 系列獲得許多其他 Android 手機多年前就有的功能
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy 智能手機和平板電腦現已支持實時網速指示器功能，該功能通過 QuickStar 模組在狀態欄中顯示。

articles.title: Trump’s Name (Set in the Wrong Font, of Course) Has Been Removed From the Kennedy Center
articles.title_zh: Trump 的名字（設置在錯誤的字體中，當然）已從甘迺迪表演中心移除

articles.title_zh: Apple 的 Private Cloud Compute 對第三方開發者的限制嚴重

articles.title_zh: 美國政府指示 Anthropic 以國家安全為由關閉 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 模型

articles.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
articles.summary: Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 暫停新模型訪問，印度辯論其 AI 未來
articles.summary_zh: 科技領袖們辯論 Anthropic 事件是否是印度 AI 野心的警鐘。

articles.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing’s demand
articles.summary: Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.
articles.title_zh: Meta 據報在北京要求後開始撤銷 20 億美元 Manus 交易
articles.summary_zh: Meta 在北京下令反轉交易後，開始拆除其 20 億美元的 Manus 收購。

articles.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
articles.summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.
articles.title_zh: KPMG 因明顯幻覺撤回 AI 使用報告
articles.summary_zh: AI 再次證明是關於 AI 資訊的不可靠來源。

articles.title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
articles.summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.
articles.title_zh: Amazon CEO 據報在政府打擊前提出 Anthropic 模型安全顧慮
articles.summary_zh: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy 可能是導致 Anthropic 在周五切斷全球兩個模型訪問的安全顧慮來源。

articles.title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
articles.summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 面臨州檢察長調查
articles.summary_zh: 尚不清楚涉及哪些州，但他們正詢問從 OpenAI 廣告政策到其健康數據處理的所有事項。

articles.title: Anterix: ‘Terrific’ results from NTN testing with Lynk Global
articles.summary: In sum, what to know: –Taking NTN beyond consumers: Anterix, which owns 900 MHz spectrum and targets the utility and enterprise private wireless space, is testing space-based direct-to-device connectivity with the aim of providing utilities with NTN connectivity. –Device line-up:…
articles.title_zh: Anterix：與Lynk Global的NTN測試獲得「驚人」成果
articles.summary_zh: Anterix擁有900 MHz頻譜並針對公用事業和企業私有無線領域，正在測試基於衛星的直連設備連接，旨在為公用事業提供NTN連接能力。

articles.title: Fable 5 and Mythos 5 remain suspended: “The ball is in Anthropic’s court”
articles.summary: On Friday evening, Anthropic suddenly disabled its new flagship models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5, after the U.S. government became aware of a way to perform a specific jailbreak on Fable 5 and put it under an export control order. Since this order applies to all foreigners, including those in the U.S., Anthropic had no other choice but to disable these models for everybody. As of now, it is unclear what this jailbreak entailed, and Anthropic argues that what the government showed were “minor vulnerabilities” that “all appear relatively simple,” and that don’t go beyond the capabilities of other publicly available models. When Anthropic announced Fable 5 and Mythos 5, it noted that Fable 5 had undergone extensive red-teaming security exercises with the help of the
articles.title_zh: Fable 5 和 Mythos 5 仍處於暫停狀態：「球在 Anthropic 的場地上」
articles.summary_zh: Anthropic 在美國政府發現針對 Fable 5 的特定越獄方式後，於週五晚間突然停用其新旗艦模型 Fable 5 和 Mythos 5，並受到出口管制令約束。該命令適用於所有外國人，包括美國境內的人員。

articles.title: Why AI retrieval and ranking need more than vector search
articles.summary: A recent GigaOm CxO Decision Brief explores how AI retrieval architectures are evolving beyond flat vector databases as organizations combine semantic search, ranking, personalization, and machine learning inference in production systems. Vector search changed the AI infrastructure landscape by making semantic retrieval practical at scale. By converting text, images, and user behavior into embeddings, organizations could move beyond exact keyword matching and retrieve information based on meaning. But production AI systems rarely stop at vector similarity. A real-world query often requires multiple signals to be evaluated simultaneously. Semantic relevance may be one factor, but so are structured attributes, business rules, personalization signals, freshness, access controls, recommendatio
articles.title_zh: 為什麼 AI 檢索和排名需要超越向量搜尋
articles.summary_zh: GigaOm CxO Decision Brief 探討了 AI 檢索架構如何超越扁平向量資料庫，透過在生產系統中結合語義搜尋、排名、個性化和機器學習推論來演進。向量搜尋通過改變 AI 基礎設施格局而使組織能夠提升搜尋能力。

articles.title: Can JetBrains close the IDE skills gap before AI widens it further?
articles.summary: JetBrains recently launched a program to bring hands-on coding practice into its professional development environments, targeting the gap between how programming is taught online and how it’s practiced in the industry. The JetBrains Course Creators Program , announced last month, lets independent educators on platforms like Udemy, Coursera , LinkedIn Learning, and Pluralsight embed practical exercises directly into JetBrains IDEs via the JetBrains Academy plugin . The pitch is that students shouldn’t just watch videos and take quizzes — they should write, run, and debug code in the same tools they’ll encounter on the job. “Online programming education still has a major gap: students learn concepts through videos and browser-based exercises but rarely get to co
articles.title_zh: JetBrains 能否在 AI 進一步擴大技能差距之前彌補 IDE 技能缺口？
articles.summary_zh: JetBrains 最近推出了一項計畫，將實踐編碼引入其專業開發環境，旨在縮小線上程式設計教學方式與業界實踐方式之間的差距。該 JetBrains Course Creators Program 上月宣布，允許獨立開發者參與。

articles.title: Loops are replacing prompts. Verification is about to be your biggest problem.
articles.summary: Something shifted in the AI coding discourse this month. The argument is no longer about whether agents can write production code or which model is best. It is about who, or what, should be prompting them. The phrase that captured it, “design loops that prompt your agents,” set off a week of discussion that Matt Van Horn synthesized well . Strip away the noise, and the signal is clear: A third era of agentic development is taking shape, and it raises significant questions about what engineers do, what software delivery costs, and what infrastructure must exist beneath it. For teams building cloud-native applications on Kubernetes, the answers to those three questions are about to matter a great deal. Three eras, one direction Agentic development has moved the human up one level
articles.title_zh: 迴圈正在取代提示詞。驗證即將成為你最大的問題
articles.summary_zh: 本月 AI 編碼討論中發生了轉變，焦點不再是代理能否編寫生產程式碼或哪個模型最佳，而是誰或什麼應該提示它們。「設計提示你的代理的迴圈」這一表述引發了廣泛討論。

articles.title: Starmer to Meet Japan’s Takaichi as Fighter Jet Funding Sputters
articles.summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer will meet his Japanese counterpart Sanae Takaichi on Sunday as uncertainty mounts over their joint fighter jet program with Italy because of doubts about the UK’s commitment.
articles.title_zh: 史達默將與日本高市會面 戰鬥機聯合開發資金陷入困境
articles.summary_zh: 英國首相基爾·史達默將於週日與日本首相高市早苗會面，因英國承諾引發疑慮，三國聯合戰鬥機開發計劃前景不明。

articles.title: Review: Disclosure Day is big on action, light on ideas
articles.summary: The summer blockbuster season has kicked off in earnest with the theatrical release of Disclosure Day , director Steven Spielberg’s highly anticipated return to his “aliens are among us” sci-fi roots. Verdict: there's not much fresh or original here as movies about aliens go, but it's a fast-paced film with a luminous performance by Emily Blunt that won't fail to entertain. (Some spoilers below but no major reveals.) The first half of the film is essentially a political thriller—shades of 1974's The Parallax View and similar films—as global tensions have the world teetering on the brink of World War III. A cybersecurity specialist named Daniel (Josh O'Connor) has stolen a piece of alien technology and highly classified files from his employer, Wardex Corporation, a top-secret extension of
articles.title_zh: 評論：Disclosure Day 動作十足但缺乏創意
articles.summary_zh: 暑期大片檔期如火如荼展開，Steven Spielberg執導的Disclosure Day上映，標誌其回歸「外星人在我們身邊」科幻題材的力作；雖然創意不足，但節奏緊湊精彩。

articles.summary: 人工智慧帶動電力需求持續攀升，中國核能擴張速度也迅速逼近美國。Gavekal Technologies 最新報 […]
articles.title_zh: AI 用電需求推動核電競賽，中國核能擴張逼近美國
articles.summary_zh: 人工智慧帶動電力需求持續攀升，中國核能擴張速度也迅速逼近美國。Gavekal Technologies 最新報 […]

articles.title: 不靠折扣靠「策展」！誠品黑膠市集業績狂飆四成，實體零售用沉浸體驗收服消費者
articles.summary: 從書店黑膠市集到百貨日本展，台灣零售業者不只靠折扣攬客，而是以獨家首賣、沉浸體驗與創意策展，為消費者製造出門的 […]
articles.title_zh: 不靠折扣靠「策展」！誠品黑膠市集業績狂飆四成，實體零售用沉浸體驗收服消費者
articles.summary_zh: 從書店黑膠市集到百貨日本展，台灣零售業者不只靠折扣攬客，而是以獨家首賣、沉浸體驗與創意策展，為消費者製造出門的 […]

articles.title: 同胞雙星化學成分大不同，HD 81809 上演恆星生吞行星的「犯罪現場」
articles.summary: 天文學家研究一個名為 HD 81809 的特殊雙星系統時，發現兩顆理應同時誕生的恆星，竟擁有截然不同的化學組成 […]
articles.title_zh: 同胞雙星化學成分大不同，HD 81809 上演恆星生吞行星的「犯罪現場」
articles.summary_zh: 天文學家研究一個名為 HD 81809 的特殊雙星系統時，發現兩顆理應同時誕生的恆星，竟擁有截然不同的化學組成 […]

articles.title: 外星訪客 3I/ATLAS 又有新發現，韋伯直接偵測到含甲烷與大量二氧化碳
articles.summary: NASA 詹姆斯·韋伯太空望遠鏡再傳突破，首次在彗星 3I/ATLAS 直接偵測到甲烷，並確認含異常大量二氧化 […]
articles.title_zh: 外星訪客 3I/ATLAS 又有新發現，韋伯直接偵測到含甲烷與大量二氧化碳
articles.summary_zh: NASA 詹姆斯·韋伯太空望遠鏡再傳突破，首次在彗星 3I/ATLAS 直接偵測到甲烷，並確認含異常大量二氧化 […]

articles.title: Intel's upcoming 'Raptor Lake Next' will reportedly top out at 20 cores and retain Core 200 branding — Lineup may include a special 10-core SKU with 24MB of L3 cache
articles.summary: Intel's Raptor Lake family might be coming back for a third time and sit alongside Nova Lake on shelves as the budget-oriented offering from the company.
articles.title_zh: Intel 即將推出的 'Raptor Lake Next' 據報將配備最多 20 核心並保留 Core 200 品牌 — 產品線可能包括一款特殊的 10 核心 SKU，配備 24MB L3 快取
articles.summary_zh: Intel 的 Raptor Lake 系列可能將第三次回歸，並作為公司預算導向的產品與 Nova Lake 並排銷售。

articles.title: Amazon says its data centers consume only 0.075% of the water Americans use for watering their lawns and gardens — company also boasts of its improvements in water efficiency
articles.summary: Amazon says that it uses 2.5 billion gallons of water annually for data center cooling but compares it to the 3.3 trillion gallons of water used for watering lawns and gardens in the U.S. every year.
articles.title_zh: Amazon 稱其資料中心僅消耗美國人用於澆灌草坪和花園水量的 0.075% — 公司也誇耀其水效率的改善
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 表示年耗 25 億加侖水用於資料中心冷卻，但與美國每年用於澆灌草坪和花園的 3.3 兆加侖水相比微乎其微。

articles.title: Apple made marketing gold from the Power Mac G4 'supercomputer' export ban in 1999 — Pentagon banned sales of the 400 MHz G4 in 50 countries when it launched and became the first PC to be classed as a weapon
articles.summary: In the context of the recent tech export bans, we look back at the Apple PowerMac G4 export ban from 1999 and Steve Jobs making marketing gold from the situation.
articles.title_zh: Apple 從 Power Mac G4「超級電腦」1999 年出口禁令中獲得營銷黃金 — 五角大廈在 400 MHz G4 推出時禁止其在 50 個國家銷售，成為首款被列為武器的個人電腦
articles.summary_zh: 在最近科技出口禁令的背景下，我們回顧 1999 年 Apple PowerMac G4 的出口禁令，以及 Steve Jobs 如何從中創造營銷奇蹟。

articles.title: Computer History Museum recalls ‘astonishing’ retro haul recovered from abandoned German warehouse — over 2,000 artifacts spanning the 1930s to 1980s required seven tractor-trailers after a WWII bomb scare
articles.summary: The Computer History Museum recalls one of its biggest ever retro treasure troves. This ‘astonishing’ haul was rescued from an abandoned warehouse in the town of Castrop-Rauxel, Germany.
articles.title_zh: 電腦歷史博物館回憶從廢棄德國倉庫發現的「驚人」復古收藏 — 跨越 1930 年代至 1980 年代超過 2,000 件文物因二戰炸彈警報需七輛拖車運輸
articles.summary_zh: 電腦歷史博物館回憶起其有史以來最大的復古寶藏之一，這批「驚人」收藏從德國卡斯特羅-勞克塞爾鎮的廢棄倉庫中搶救出來。

articles.title: Researchers recycle old phones and cluster them into ‘computing platforms’ — says processors on modern smartphones deliver higher single-core performance than comparable multicore servers
articles.summary: A team of researchers from UC San Diego found that 'old' smartphones from 2023 could be combined to build a server capable of running apps locally, instead of relying on cloud servers located on a distant site.
articles.title_zh: 研究人員將舊手機回收並組合成「運算平台」— 稱現代智慧型手機上的處理器的單核效能超越可比的多核伺服器
articles.summary_zh: 來自加州大學聖地亞哥分校的研究團隊發現，2023 年的「舊」智慧型手機可組合成能在本地運行應用的伺服器，無需依賴遠端雲伺服器。

articles.title: Snapmaker launches $150,000 Innovation Fund for open source 3D printing — cash rewards target developers backing the U1 toolchanger across Klipper, OrcaSlicer, and Moonraker ecosystems
articles.summary: Snapmaker celebrates 10 years in business by sponsoring open-source developers and you.
articles.title_zh: Snapmaker 推出 15 萬美元開源 3D 列印創新基金 — 現金獎勵針對支持 U1 換刀頭的 Klipper、OrcaSlicer 和 Moonraker 生態系統開發者
articles.summary_zh: Snapmaker 慶祝營運 10 週年，透過贊助開源開發者和用戶來慶祝。

articles.title: Grab this MSI Codex Z2 16-thread gaming Ryzen PC with a 2TB SSD at a $400 discount — system packs a Ryzen 8700F, 16GB DDR5, and RTX 5060 Ti 8GB for $1,499
articles.summary: MSI's prebuilt gaming desktop pairs a Zen 4 processor with Nvidia's latest RTX 5060 Ti graphics card and comes housed in an airflow-focused chassis with ARGB lighting.
articles.title_zh: 以 $400 折扣入手此 MSI Codex Z2 16 執行緒遊戲 Ryzen PC，配備 2TB SSD — 系統配備 Ryzen 8700F、16GB DDR5 和 RTX 5060 Ti 8GB，售價 $1,499
articles.summary_zh: MSI 的預組裝遊戲桌機配備 Zen 4 處理器和 Nvidia 最新的 RTX 5060 Ti 顯示卡，置於具氣流聚焦設計和 ARGB 燈光的機殼內。

articles.title: New 3D printer tech uses elliptical laser beams to stir molten metal and create ‘alloys-on-demand’ — existing machinery can implement technique in software meaning for more convenient, stronger alloy printing
articles.summary: NIST has demonstrated a metal 3D printing method that stirs molten metal during the print by sending the laser along looping elliptical paths instead of straight lines.
articles.title_zh: 新 3D 列印技術使用橢圓形雷射光束攪拌熔融金屬並建立「隨需合金」— 現有機械可透過軟體實現該技術，使更便利、更強的合金列印成為可能
articles.summary_zh: NIST 展示了一種金屬 3D 列印方法，透過沿著迴圈橢圓路徑而非直線發送雷射來在列印期間攪拌熔融金屬。

articles.title: Microsoft is reportedly testing Copilot+ AI features with discrete GPUs instead of NPUs — a feature available on Windows App SDK with a Windows Insider Experimental Channel build and Developer Mode turned on
articles.summary: Microsoft is experimenting with Windows AI features on non-Copilot devices, finally allowing AI features to run on discrete GPUs. This move expands its user base and gives more users access to Windows 11 local AI capabilities.
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 據報正測試搭載獨立 GPU 而非 NPU 的 Copilot+ AI 功能 — 該功能可在 Windows App SDK 中使用，配備 Windows Insider 實驗頻道組態和開發者模式
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 正在非 Copilot 裝置上測試 Windows AI 功能，最終允許 AI 功能在獨立 GPU 上執行，擴展用戶群並讓更多用戶存取 Windows 11 本機 AI 功能。

articles.title: OpenAI hit with sweeping probe from massive coalition of 42 US state attorneys general just days after reported IPO filing — subpoena targets ChatGPT maker’s ads, data practices, handling of minors, model sycophancy, and safety policies
articles.summary: State attorneys general have opened a broad investigation into OpenAI, subpoenaing documents on ads, user retention, data handling, minors, health data, model behavior, and safety policies.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 遭 42 州檢察總長組成的龐大聯盟全面調查，時間距報導 IPO 申請僅數日 — 傳票涉及 ChatGPT 製造商的廣告、資料實踐、未成年人處理、模型媚俗行為和安全政策
articles.summary_zh: 州檢察總長已針對 OpenAI 啟動廣泛調查，傳喚有關廣告、用戶留存、資料處理、未成年人、健康資料、模型行為和安全政策的文件。

articles.title: AMD taunts Apple's MacBook Neo for failing to run 75% of top PC games — Only 5 out of the 20 top PC games work on the Neo, while all run on AMD's budget offerings
articles.summary: AMD is reminding folks not to buy a MacBook, even if it's as good of a deal as the Neo, if you primarily want to game on it. Instead, AMD's own budget laptops can run all the modern titles you want, with a small caveat.
articles.title_zh: AMD 嘲笑 Apple MacBook Neo 無法執行 75% 的熱門 PC 遊戲 — 在 20 款熱門 PC 遊戲中，僅 5 款可在 Neo 上執行，而全部都能在 AMD 的預算型產品上執行
articles.summary_zh: AMD 提醒人們不要購買 MacBook，即使它像 Neo 一樣划算，如果你主要想在上面玩遊戲。AMD 自有的預算型筆電可執行所有現代遊戲，但有一小個警告。

articles.title: US government warned Anthropic that Fable 5 had been jailbroken, but firm 'refused' to fix before US implemented export controls — Anthropic defended its decision by saying the jailbreak 'isn’t serious,' Chinese group had reportedly accessed model
articles.summary: David Sacks said the US government warned Anthropic that Claude Fable 5 had been jailbroken and that CEO Dario Amodei refused to fix the flaw.
articles.title_zh: 美國政府警告 Anthropic Fable 5 遭越獄，但公司「拒絕」在美國實施出口管制前修復 — Anthropic 聲稱該越獄「不嚴重」為由為決定辯護，中國團隊據報曾存取該模型
articles.summary_zh: David Sacks 表示美國政府警告 Anthropic Claude Fable 5 遭越獄，CEO Dario Amodei 拒絕修復該漏洞。

articles.title: AI cryptomining network's 320,000 RTX 3090-class GPUs allegedly burn 112 megawatts of power on ‘zero useful AI computation’ — GPU rental costs jump 38%, but Pearl’s cards are doing random matrix math, study claims
articles.summary: A preprint claims Pearl’s AI mining network consumes 320,000 GPU-equivalents and 112 MW while producing no verified useful AI computation.
articles.title_zh: AI 挖礦網路的 320,000 個 RTX 3090 級 GPU 據稱消耗 112 百萬瓦特電力進行「零有用 AI 運算」— GPU 租賃成本上漲 38%，但 Pearl 的卡進行隨機矩陣數學運算，研究稱
articles.summary_zh: 一份預印本聲稱 Pearl 的 AI 挖礦網路消耗 320,000 個 GPU 等效物和 112 MW，但未產生任何經驗證的有用 AI 運算。

articles.title: Razer Kiyo V2 X Review: Auto-focus for life
articles.summary: Razer's Kiyo V2 X is the most budget-friendly of its current webcam lineup; it records video at 1440p / 60 fps and features "speedy" auto-focus, a wide 80-degree field of view, and a smoothly integrated physical privacy shutter.
articles.title_zh: Razer Kiyo V2 X 評測：自動對焦終身享受
articles.summary_zh: Razer 的 Kiyo V2 X 是其目前網路攝影機產線中最經濟實惠的選擇，錄製 1440p / 60 fps 影片，具有「迅速」的自動對焦、寬闊的 80 度視場角和平順整合的實體隱私快門。

articles.title: Hardcore SpongeBob speedrunners smudged Xbox optical disks with sweat and grease to exploit 'lag clip' trick — filthy smeared disks cut gameplay times in ultimate pursuit of speed
articles.summary: A grease smear-induced optical disc reading quirk can save speedrunners lots of time in SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom on Xbox.
articles.title_zh: 硬核 SpongeBob 速跑者用汗水和油脂塗抹 Xbox 光學光碟以利用「延遲剪輯」技巧 — 骯髒塗抹的光碟在追求速度的終極目標中縮短遊戲時間
articles.summary_zh: 在 Xbox 版本的《海綿寶寶：比基尼城堡爭奪戰》中，由油脂塗抹引起的光學光碟讀取怪癖可以為速跑者節省大量時間。

articles.title: Apple still has three unannounced iOS 27 features in the pipeline: report
articles.summary: Apple wrapped up its WWDC 2026 keynote this week, outlining all of its major new software features for the coming year, with Siri AI and improved stability taking the spotlight. That said, there are a few new features that are reportedly still in the works, and we should still see them by September, per Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman .
articles.title_zh: Apple 仍有三項未公開的 iOS 27 功能在開發中：報導
articles.summary_zh: Apple 在本週完成了 WWDC 2026 主題演講，展示了來年的主要新軟體功能，Siri AI 和改進的穩定性成為亮點。據報導，仍有一些新功能正在開發中，預計將在九月前推出。

articles.title: I can’t quit Google News — but these 5 things make me want to
articles.summary: Google News is easily one of the most popular news aggregators on the planet , with more than a billion Android downloads and over 100 million monthly visits to its web platform. With aggregated content from over 20,000 publishers, there’s a lot to love about Google News. Of course, there’s also plenty to complain about. I personally use Google News as my go-to source, but I certainly wish a few things were handled a little differently. With that in mind, here are five features I think Google News desperately needs to add.
articles.title_zh: 我無法放棄 Google News — 但這 5 件事讓我想要放棄
articles.summary_zh: Google News 是全球最受歡迎的新聞聚合器之一，擁有超過 10 億次 Android 下載和 1 億多次月度網頁訪問。彙整來自超過 20,000 家出版商的內容，Google News 有許多優點。

articles.title: I let Claude audit my messy Home Assistant setup, and it was a massive wake-up call
articles.summary: Spend enough time in the self-hosting and smart home hobby, and even the most ardent smart home enthusiast eventually reaches a moment where the excitement of adding new gadgets gives way to the actual, soul-crushing reality of system maintenance. Home Assistant is widely considered the gold standard for local, platform-agnostic automation, but its greatest strength is also its greatest vulnerability. Because Home Assistant welcomes almost any device with an internet connection or a Zigbee radio into the fold, a growing system eventually turns into an unmanageable graveyard of orphaned entities, duplicate integrations, and broken automations that you constantly promise yourself you will fix next weekend.
articles.title_zh: 我讓 Claude 審計我混亂的 Home Assistant 設置，這是一個巨大的警鐘
articles.summary_zh: 在自託管和智慧家居愛好中花足夠時間後，即使是最熱情的智慧家居愛好者最終也會意識到，添加新小工具的興奮感會讓位於系統維護的現實。Home Assistant 被廣泛認為是行業標準。

articles.title: The reMarkable Paper Pure made me want to start writing things down again
articles.summary: As a kid, my favorite part of back-to-school shopping was picking out notebooks for the new year. Back then, they were color-coded by subject (according to the system in my head), and equipped with obnoxious spirals that would almost certainly get tangled in my backpack. It’s been a long time since I’ve shopped a school supply list, but my love of notebooks hasn’t gone anywhere. That’s probably why the reMarkable Paper Pure () won me over so quickly. While many E-Ink tablets try to pack in productivity features, and Amazon’s Kindles keep adding limitations and AI tools, the Paper Pure is refreshingly committed to being exactly one thing: a really good digital notebook. After more than a week with the device, I’m in no rush to take it back out of my tech rotation.
articles.title_zh: reMarkable Paper Pure 讓我想重新開始記筆記
articles.summary_zh: 作為孩子，我最喜歡的返校購物部分是為新學年挑選筆記本。那時，它們按科目用顏色編碼，配備令人討厭的螺旋裝訂，幾乎肯定會纏在我的背包裡。

articles.title: Fitbit’s new health coach is worse than my mom
articles.summary: Google has teased its new AI-powered Health Coach in the Fitbit Google Health app for several months now and started testing it publicly with users who opted into the experiment. I’ve been wanting to take it for a spin and see how good it was, especially compared to Oura’s excellent insights and Advisor, but I couldn’t because it hadn’t rolled out to my account just yet. A few weeks ago, just before I was about to head on a week-long trip, I got the notification asking me if I wanted to try the new health coach, and I instantly agreed. For the first week, I was running around Romania, pushing myself, and keeping an eye on how insightful the coach is… or not. Then I came back home and had to see how it adapted to a different rhythm. I admit, most days when I opened the Fitbit a.k.a. Google
articles.title_zh: Fitbit 的新健康教練還不如我媽媽
articles.summary_zh: Google 已在 Fitbit Google Health 應用中測試其新的 AI 動力健康教練數個月，並開始與選擇參與實驗的用戶進行公開測試。我一直想試一試看，看看它相比 Oura 的優質洞察和 Advance 的表現如何。

articles.title: I’ve got to hand it to the SwitchBot Lock Vision Pro and its palm-vein authentication
articles.summary: Getting locked out sucks. Besides just being incredibly inconvenient, it can also prove dangerous and expensive. But luckily for all of us, we’re basically living in the future, and locks have gotten so robust with their feature sets that there are fewer and fewer excuses for getting locked out in the first place all the time. With its new Lock Vision Pro, SwitchBot takes that kind of forward thinking to the extreme, offering a smart lock with its own redundant power supply and over half a dozen different ways to authenticate your access. Is this the end-all, be-all of smart locks, or has SwitchBot bitten off more than it can chew? Let’s take a look at exactly what the Lock Vision Pro offers, and how well it performs in day-to-day usage.
articles.title_zh: 我必須讚揚 SwitchBot Lock Vision Pro 及其掌靜脈認證
articles.summary_zh: 被鎖在外面很糟糕。除了非常不方便外，還可能帶來危險和成本。幸運的是，我們基本上生活在未來，鎖變得非常強大，被鎖在外面的藉口越來越少。

articles.title: 5 hidden features I didn’t know my Samsung phone had
articles.summary: Credit: Joe Maring / Android Authority One of my favorite things about owning a Samsung phone is just how much extra it offers on top of Android. And having used Galaxy phones for almost five years, I always thought I knew pretty much every trick and hidden feature One UI had to offer. Turns out, I was giving myself way too much credit. Over the past few months, I’ve stumbled across several features I had no idea existed. What’s funny is that most of them weren’t buried deep inside menus or locked behind Good Lock modules . They were all sitting in plain sight the entire time. Now that I’ve found them, though, I feel somewhat obligated to share them so others don’t miss out on them the way I did.
articles.title_zh: 我不知道我的 Samsung 手機有的 5 個隱藏功能
articles.summary_zh: 擁有 Samsung 手機我最喜歡的一件事是它在 Android 基礎上提供了多少額外功能。在使用 Galaxy 手機近五年後，我一直認為我知道 One UI 提供的幾乎每個技巧和隱藏功能。

articles.title: I turned my 7-year-old Android tablet into the ultimate Kindle killer, and you can too
articles.summary: I love the idea of the Amazon Kindle, or just e-book readers in general. A simple, single-use device that condenses thousands of books into one product has understandable appeal. However, with Amazon effectively bricking devices released before 2013 , tying myself to a product that could become a paperweight in the future doesn’t seem like a great way to spend my cash. So, I went shopping at my local device repo — also known as the decrepit device drawer in my office — and pulled out a 2019 Samsung Galaxy Tab A 8.0. It certainly wasn’t a high-end product even in its day, but the budget slate is small, lightweight, portable, and a potential book reader with a far higher ceiling than Amazon’s restrictive experience.
articles.title_zh: 我將我 7 年舊的 Android 平板電腦變成了終極 Kindle 殺手，你也可以
articles.summary_zh: 我喜歡 Amazon Kindle 或電子書閱讀器的概念。一個將數千本書濃縮為一個產品的簡單單一用途設備有其吸引力。但由於 Amazon 有效地停用了 2013 年之前發布的設備，我將自己綁定到可能會變成負擔的產品。

articles.title: Google just pushed me one step closer to ditching Google Home for Amazon Alexa
articles.summary: Google has, in quite literal terms, turned into an AI company. But ironically enough, it has evidently and consistently drifted away from that one product category meant to make AI omnipresent: smart speakers. Google’s indifference towards its smart speaker lineup for the better part of the decade and its declining everyday performance have already led people to question their decision to be in the Google Assistant ecosystem. While Google recently announced its first smart speaker in several years, it’s still not publicly available. And on top of that, Google has seemingly discontinued the Nest Mini and Nest Audio .
articles.title_zh: Google 剛剛讓我更進一步放棄 Google Home 轉向 Amazon Alexa
articles.summary_zh: Google 在字面意義上已經成為了一家 AI 公司。但諷刺的是，它顯然且持續地背離了旨在使 AI 無處不在的產品類別：智慧揚聲器。Google 在近十年來對其智慧揚聲器陣容的漠視。

articles.title: Deals: Pixel 10 phones come with price cuts and a free Google TV Streamer, Galaxy S26+ discounted
articles.summary: Mexico and South Africa kicked off the FIFA World Cup on Friday. Germany’s first match is this Sunday and it is against Curaçao. Why are we mentioning this? Well, Google has a special promotion – you can get a free Google TV Streamer plus a World Cup-themed Pixelsnap Ring Stand with a Pixel 10, 10 Pro or 10 Pro XL. You can find out more about the offer here. Using the TV Streamer (or any other Google TV device), you will be able to watch the matches live, check the schedule, see match highlights and post-game analysis. The Google Pixel 10 Pro and Pixel 10 Pro XL flagships are both...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Pixel 10 手機降價並附送免費 Google TV Streamer，Galaxy S26+ 打折
articles.summary_zh: 墨西哥和南非在週五開始了 FIFA 世界盃。德國的首場比賽在本週日進行，對陣 Curaçao。為什麼要提及此事？Google 有特別促銷 — 購買 Pixel 10、10 Pro 可以獲得免費 Google TV Streamer 和世界盃主題的 Pixelsnap Ring Stand。

articles.title: PagerDuty’s CAIO says most AI incident tools are missing a critical layer
articles.summary: AI is empowering software teams to ship code faster than ever. Given that an average of 70% of incidents stem directly from modifications and updates to live systems, higher velocity can also lead to more frequent incidents.  As incident rates increase, we need to evolve from the traditional response approaches that were never designed for this speed. “As incident rates increase, we need to evolve from the traditional response approaches that were never designed for this speed.” The solution is to build an AI ecosystem that connects tools and draws on proprietary operational data to help teams diagnose, remediate, and even prevent incidents before they spiral out of control. Such a system requires a standardized way for AI tools to exchange information and perform actions,
articles.title_zh: PagerDuty CAIO表示大多数AI事件工具缺少关键层
articles.summary_zh: 虽然AI使软件团队能够更快地交付代码,但由于平均70%的事件源于实时系统的修改和更新,更高的发布速度也导致事件频率增加,需要超越传统方法进行演进。

articles.title: The Strait of Hormuz Has Been Closed for 100 Days. Why Aren’t Oil Prices Higher?
articles.summary: President Donald Trump says a secret mission moved 100 million barrels of oil through the blocked Strait of Hormuz. That number is impossible to verify.
articles.title_zh: 荷莫茲海峽已關閉100天。為什麼油價沒有更高?
articles.summary_zh: 川普總統宣稱一項秘密任務已將1億桶石油運過被封鎖的荷莫茲海峽,但該數字無法核實。

articles.summary: This handheld device combines red light therapy, microcurrents, sonic vibration, warmth, and a serum to support healthy hair growth.

articles.title: 7 Best Coffee Makers (2026): Ratio, Fellow, Moccamaster

articles.summary_zh: 傳統滴漏式咖啡機已有長足發展,這些先進機器能讓你的咖啡師成為陌生人。

articles.title: Škoda’s New EV Will Likely Be Its Most Expensive Yet
articles.summary: The Škoda Peaq, which will debut this summer as the European automaker’s flagship model, seats seven and has an intriguing design. It will almost certainly come with a hefty price tag.

articles.summary_zh: 該公司為可折疊 iPhone 和觸屏 MacBook 做準備。

articles.title: Crypto Token’s 50% Wipeout Shows Magnitude of AI-Hacking Threat
articles.summary: When Eli Ben-Sasson helped create the Zcash cryptocurrency nearly a decade ago, the cryptographer worried about human adversaries. He didn’t expect that machine intelligence would one day expose a flaw that had eluded years of expert human judgment.
articles.title_zh: 加密代幣50%暴跌顯示 AI 駭客威脅的規模
articles.summary_zh: 近十年前幫助創建 Zcash 加密貨幣的密碼學家 Eli Ben-Sasson 擔心人類對手,但他沒想到機器智能有朝一日會暴露出躲過多年專家人類判斷的漏洞。

articles.title: How Google Is Reinventing Search with AI
articles.summary: Google is making the biggest change to its search business in more than two decades, integrating AI-generated answers, conversational search, and reasoning tools directly into the heart of its search product, which has shaped the course of content and the internet.. Nick Fox, Google’s Senior Vice President of Knowledge and Information, argues that AI allows users to ask more complex questions and get faster, more useful answers while still connecting people to content across the web. But, for creators and publishers, fewer keystrokes could make a difference. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Google 如何用 AI 重新發明搜尋
articles.summary_zh: Google 正在對其搜尋業務進行二十多年來最大變革,將 AI 生成答案、對話式搜尋和推理工具直接整合到搜尋產品核心。

articles.title: AI Turns Coders, Lawyers and Analysts Into Ghosts of London’s Past
articles.summary: Search for “finance analyst” and you’re likely to find around 80 vacancies in London, according to a prominent recruitment website. If that seems like a surprisingly low number for one of the world’s biggest banking and corporate hubs, it’s because it is — four years earlier, the same website featured more than 350 of these roles.
articles.title_zh: AI 將編碼員、律師和分析師變成倫敦的過去幽靈
articles.summary_zh: 在倫敦搜尋「財務分析師」,根據著名招聘網站,你可能會找到約80個職位空缺,這個數字對全球最大的銀行和企業樞紐之一來說出奇地低。

articles.title: UK to Announce Social Media Ban for Teens This Week, Nandy Says
articles.summary: A UK ban on under-16s using social media set to be unveiled this week is not “a silver bullet” but will have “a significant role to play” in keeping children safe, Culture Secretary Lisa Nandy told Sky News on Sunday.
articles.title_zh: 英國將於本週宣布青少年禁用社交媒體,Nandy 表示
articles.summary_zh: 文化大臣 Lisa Nandy 告訴天空新聞公司,本週公佈的16歲以下禁用社交媒體並非「靈丹妙藥」,但將在保護兒童方面發揮「重要作用」。
